title: Delicious Crisp British Cornmeal Shepherds Pie
description: A comforting winey and crisp vegetarian shepherds pie featuring fine yellow cornmeal, perfect for a sick day. This dish is infused with oil for added flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until softened.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Add the red wine to the skillet and cook until the liquid is almost completely evaporated.
Stir in the vegetable broth, tomato paste, and frozen peas and carrots, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the mixture cook while preparing the cornmeal topping.
In a large bowl, combine the fine yellow cornmeal, a pinch of salt, and a grind of black pepper.
Add a small amount of water to the bowl and stir until the cornmeal forms a crumbly mixture.
Transfer the mushroom mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with the cornmeal mixture and shredded cheddar cheese.
Bake the shepherds pie in the preheated oven for 35 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the filling is hot and bubbly.
